summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed open PRs plus one linked security-sensitive issue. No merge, close, fix, label, or comment mutations are planned. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined; unrelated PRs are kept as related or independent pending normal maintainer review.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with focused code and passing proof, but merge is blocked by job policy and no duplicate closeout is appropriate.
Related to the MCP env-key bug family, but the canonical PR choice between #92491 and #92484 needs maintainer review outside this inventory plan.
Standalone useful PR; keep it independent for normal maintainer review.
Related useful work with proof and mergeability blockers; keep open rather than close, merge, or escalate the whole cluster.
Viable open fix candidate for a linked issue; merge/close actions are not allowed in this plan shard.
Related non-security-classified PR with security-adjacent context; keep open and quarantine the exact security-sensitive linked issue separately.
Useful but stale related test PR; do not close as duplicate because the artifact indicates the overwrite-vs-merge coverage may still be unique.
Security-sensitive item is out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation.
Related test coverage PR for an open issue; no close, merge, or fixed-by-candidate action is allowed in plan mode.
Maintainer-owned draft PR is independent backlog work; keep it open and do not mutate.
Security-sensitive linked issue must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, not deduped or closed by this worker.
